productDisplayName: Flying Machine Men Green Polo Tshirts
description: Turquoise green pique polo neck t-shirt made of 100% cotton, that has a ribbed collar and contrast ribbed sleeve hems, tape detailing on the inseam of the collar, buttoned chest placket, embroidered brand name on the left chest and right sleeve, appliqued brand tab on the left hem, huge applique and print combo on the back and vented hems
